import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let token = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sd(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    let n = xs.len()
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let v = at(xs, i)
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn join_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = at(xs, i)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = at(a, i)
    if list.contains(b, v)
      result = insert_sd(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if result.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    println(join_ints(result))
  end
end
